# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR: "ci-scripts"
  BUILD_ARTIFACT_DIR: "build-output"
  ENABLE_CACHE: "true"
  CUSTOM_ENV_FILE: ".env.ci"

.shared_runner_template:
  tags:
    - shared
  cache:
    key: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}
    paths:
      - ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/cache/
      - node_modules/
      - vendor/
      - .gradle/
      - .m2/
    policy: pull-push
  before_script:
    - echo "Pipeline started for ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}"
    - echo "Branch ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
    - echo "Commit ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_ENV_FILE}" ]; then
        echo "Loading custom environment variables"
        export $(grep -v '^#' ${CUSTOM_ENV_FILE} | xargs)
      fi
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
  artifacts:
    expire_in: 1 week
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_ARTIFACT_DIR}/
      - logs/
    reports:
      junit: reports/junit/*.xml
    when: always

prepare:environment:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: prepare
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/prepare.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom prepare script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/prepare.sh
      else
        echo "No custom prepare script found, using default"
        mkdir -p ${BUILD_ARTIFACT_DIR}
        mkdir -p logs
        mkdir -p reports/junit
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/install-dependencies.sh" ]; then
        echo "Installing custom dependencies"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/install-dependencies.sh
      fi
  cache:
    key: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}
    paths:
      - ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/cache/
      - node_modules/
      - vendor/
      - .gradle/
      - .m2/
    policy: push

build:custom:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/build.sh
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
        echo "Found Makefile, running make"
        make build
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Found package.json, running npm build"
        npm install
        npm run build
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "Found pom.xml, running Maven build"
        mvn clean package
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
        echo "Found build.gradle, running Gradle build"
        ./gradlew build
      elif [ -f "setup.py" ]; then
        echo "Found setup.py, running Python build"
        python setup.py build
      else
        echo "No build configuration found. Please provide ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/build.sh"
        exit 1
      fi
  dependencies:
    - prepare:environment

build:parallel:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: build
  parallel:
    matrix:
      - BUILD_TARGET: [frontend, backend, api, mobile]
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/build-${BUILD_TARGET}.sh" ]; then
        echo "Building ${BUILD_TARGET}"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/build-${BUILD_TARGET}.sh
      else
        echo "No build script for ${BUILD_TARGET}, skipping"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
    - when: manual
  dependencies:
    - prepare:environment

test:unit:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-unit.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom unit tests"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-unit.sh
      elif [ -f "package.json" ] && grep -q "\"test\"" package.json; then
        npm test
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        mvn test
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
        ./gradlew test
      elif [ -f "pytest.ini" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ]; then
        pytest
      else
        echo "No test configuration found"
      fi
  coverage: '/(?i)total.*? (100(?:\.0+)?\%|[1-9]?\d(?:\.\d+)?\%)$/'
  dependencies:
    - build:custom

test:integration:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-integration.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom integration tests"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-integration.sh
      else
        echo "No integration tests configured"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS == "true"'
      when: on_success
    - when: manual
  dependencies:
    - build:custom

test:custom:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-custom.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running additional custom tests"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-custom.sh
      fi
  rules:
    - exists:
        - ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-custom.sh
  dependencies:
    - build:custom

code:quality:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/code-quality.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom code quality checks"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/code-quality.sh
      fi
  allow_failure: true
  rules:
    - exists:
        - ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/code-quality.sh
  dependencies:
    - build:custom

security:scan:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/security-scan.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom security scans"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/security-scan.sh
      fi
  allow_failure: true
  rules:
    - exists:
        - ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/security-scan.sh
  dependencies:
    - build:custom

package:artifacts:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: package
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/package.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom packaging script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/package.sh
      else
        echo "Creating default package"
        tar -czf ${BUILD_ARTIFACT_DIR}/package-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz \
          --exclude=${BUILD_ARTIFACT_DIR} \
          --exclude=.git \
          --exclude=node_modules \
          --exclude=vendor \
          .
      fi
  dependencies:
    - build:custom
    - test:unit
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

package:docker:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: package
  image: docker:latest
  services:
    - docker:dind
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/docker-build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom Docker build script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/docker-build.sh
      elif [ -f "Dockerfile" ]; then
        echo "Building Docker image"
        docker build -t ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} .
        docker tag ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest
      fi
  rules:
    - exists:
        - Dockerfile
    - exists:
        - ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/docker-build.sh
  dependencies:
    - build:custom

deploy:staging:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-staging.sh" ]; then
        echo "Deploying to staging environment"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-staging.sh
      else
        echo "No staging deployment script configured"
      fi
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
      when: on_success
    - when: manual
  dependencies:
    - package:artifacts

deploy:production:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-production.sh" ]; then
        echo "Deploying to production environment"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-production.sh
      else
        echo "No production deployment script configured"
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      when: manual
  dependencies:
    - package:artifacts

deploy:custom:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-${DEPLOY_TARGET}.sh" ]; then
        echo "Deploying to ${DEPLOY_TARGET}"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-${DEPLOY_TARGET}.sh
      else
        echo "No deployment script for ${DEPLOY_TARGET}"
      fi
  environment:
    name: ${DEPLOY_TARGET}
    url: https://${DEPLOY_TARGET}.example.com
  rules:
    - if: '$DEPLOY_TARGET'
      when: manual
  dependencies:
    - package:artifacts

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH && $CI_OPEN_MERGE_REQUESTS'
      when: never
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'
